title: Lesson 923: 回覧, 海流, 改良...

items.gloss: to look back on (the past); to reflect on; to reminisce about; to look behind (at); to turn round (and look); to look over one's shoulder; to consider; to concern oneself about; to take notice of; to pay attention to; to take into consideration
to reflect on (oneself, past conduct, etc.); to contemplate; to examine; to think over; to introspect
to return; to come back; to go back; to turn over; to become extremely; to become completely
